entity: BBR source abbreviation NOJ maps to warehouse canonical NEO (New Orleans Jazz pre-relocation era, 1974)

query_target.sql: SELECT team_id, abbreviation, full_name, city, state, arena, year_founded FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612762' AND abbreviation = 'NEO'

notes: NOJ is the BBR source abbreviation for the New Orleans Jazz (1974-79 before relocation to Utah). dim_team_history only starts at 1996-97, so the modern Jazz era is UTA there; the historical NOJ era is captured in dim_team with abbreviation NEO.
